title: lithocarpus farinulentus
intro: Lithocarpus farinulentus, also known as the Chinese bur oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to southern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus farinulentus include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus farinulentus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or made into extracts and capsules for various medicinal applications.
